name: mint cilantro chicken
instructions: cook chicken breast in the spices first. mash cilantro + mint in a mortar with garlic, ginger, lime. add the mash to the cooked chicken at the end — do not cook it in.
notes: priya krishna. works better with chicken breast than thigh. do not treat like a mole — cooking the herbs in a sauce makes them lose flavor and turns the oil an unappetizing green.
